question.text: For a long put on USDINR at strike 83, the option becomes profitable (before premium) when:

answer.text: USDINR stays exactly at 83 at expiry
USDINR remains unchanged from the purchase date

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Put buyer profits when spot falls below strike. At spot < 83, intrinsic value = 83 - spot > 0. Net profit begins below the BEP (strike - premium). **The Trap:** The put buyer benefits from FALLING prices. Call buyer benefits from RISING prices. **Cross-Exam Context:** Put payoff conditions are tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Long put on USDINR = expect INR to appreciate = expect USDINR to fall.
